---
title: "Data prep Env Hazards"
format: html
---

# Setting up

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```

# Hum data

<!-- had a look at /home/rushad/Documents/HIES/vignettes/hies2016_2016_mapping.rmd for using the mapping tool -->

```{r}
flood_shp <- "../Data/Raw/Hum-Data/bgd_nhr_floods_barc/bgd_nhr_floods_sparsso.shp"
flood_sf <- read_sf(flood_shp) |> 
                mutate(FLOODCAT_L=factor(FLOODCAT_L),
                       FLOODCAT_L = fct_relevel(FLOODCAT_L, "Not Flood Prone") #bring not flood prone at the beginning
                       )
save(flood_shp, file = "../Data/Processed/flood_shp.rda")

```
